article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.3.4. 14798.Burnaby Business Licence Bylaw 2017, Amendment Bylaw No.1 2026 (FA).pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Bylaw Would Restrict Who Can Sell Bear Spray
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would limit bear spray sales in Burnaby to outdoor and sporting goods retailers only, with strict ID checks, age limits (19+), secure storage, and sales record-keeping required.
briefs.action_required: If you sell bear spray, check whether your business qualifies as an 'authorized vendor' under the proposed rules.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Bear Spray Bylaw — final adoption vote (council reconsidering)
